title: EP In the News — Firm News — ELLIS PORTER
content:
You can access the entire Bridge Magazine article here .  The article was also republished in Crain's Detroit Business .
Bridge Magazine is a publication of The Center for Michigan .
Marc, Ellis Porter's Managing Attorney, is a member of the International Medical Graduate Taskforce , a national group of select attorneys who work with leading healthcare institutions and foreign physicians on immigration issues.  He speaks frequently to industry and professional groups on topics related to healthcare and physician immigration.
